The '''Phase I Dark Trooper''' was the first model in the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark trooper]] design program.

==Characteristics==
[[File:DarkTrooper1_egtd.png|thumb|left|120px|Phase I [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was little more than a skeletal frame equipped with a [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibrosword]] attached to its right arm and a [[Blast shield/Legends|blast shield]] on its left, plus basic [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|artificial intelligence]].

==History==
Its actual military purpose is unknown as it never participated in battle, but it is known that it was used as a guard in some Imperial installations such as the [[Gromas Mines|mines]] of [[Gromas 16]] and [[Ice Station Beta/Legends|Ice Station Beta]] on [[Anteevy/Legends|Anteevy]].

The [[Dark Trooper Project]] was shut down by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after the [[Mission to the Arc Hammer|destruction]] of the ''[[Arc Hammer]]'' at the hands of [[Kyle Katarn]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'', these droids can only be created on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] if ''Arc Hammer'' is placed above that specific planet. They were also featured in some of the story missions.

The Phase I Dark Troopers were also made into figures by Hasbro in 2009.

Phase I Dark Troopers also appear in the 2001 video game ''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'' and its 2002 expansion pack, included with an Imperial [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] during gameplay, alongside the [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark troopers]].
